data.title: Royce Global Trust (NYSE: RGT) is a closed-end fund with average weekly trading volume of 63,386 shares, managed by an adviser with over 50 years of experience in small- and micro-cap investments.
data.description: On September 25, 2025, in New York, a closed-end fund focusing on global equities through a value-driven strategy was announced. The fund has an average weekly trading volume of about 63,386 shares. The adviser of the fund boasts over 50 years of expertise in investing in small- and micro-cap stocks. Closing prices were provided but exact figures were not detailed.

data.title: Hashdex broadens Crypto Index US ETF using SEC generic listing standards, the second approved multi-asset crypto investment in the US.
data.description: A recently approved investment vehicle in the United States is the second multi-asset cryptocurrency Exchange-Traded Fund (ETF) available for trading. This ETF allows investors to access a variety of cryptocurrencies through a single investment option.

data.title: Theratechnologies acquired by Future Pak for US$3.01 per Share in cash and one CVR for potential additional US$1.19 per CVR.
data.description: Montreal, September 25, 2025 - Theratechnologies Inc. (TSX: TH) (NASDAQ: THTX), a commercial-stage biopharmaceutical company, has finalized the previously announced plan of arrangement under Chapter XVI – Division II of the Business Corporations Act (Québec) involving CB Biotechnology, LLC, an affiliate of Future Pak, LLC. In this arrangement, the Purchaser has successfully acquired all the issued and outstanding common shares of the Company for a price of US$3.01 per share in cash, alongside one contingent value right (CVR) per share. The CVR entitles shareholders to potential extra cash payments, amounting to a total of up to US$1.19 per CVR if certain predetermined milestones are met by the Company.

data.title: Data Center White Box Switches Market to hit $6499 Million by 2030, growing at 12.6% CAGR - Valuates Reports.
data.description: In Bangalore, India, as of September 25, 2025, the market size of data center white box switches is a significant factor. The global market for Data Center White Box Switches had a value of USD 2754 million in 2023, and it is projected to escalate to USD 6499 million by 2030. This growth signifies a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 12.6% during the mentioned period.

data.title: Nobu Hotel Los Cabos hosts second annual art event with live demos, artworks centered on "A Sense of Belonging".
data.description: Discover the "A Sense of Belonging" art experience lasting a week in Miami starting September 25, 2025. This event, hosted at Nobu Hotel Los Cabos by Nobu Hospitality, showcases live demonstrations, classic artworks, and chances for attendees to acquire unique pieces. Explore the theme of belonging in this immersive setting.

data.title: Gourmet café Toastique in Addison, TX now owned by local couple Kirk and Jerainne Heywood as of Sept. 25, 2025.
data.description: As of September 25, 2025, the Addison, Texas location of Toastique, known for its gourmet toast, juice, and coffee offerings, is now managed by a local couple, Kirk and Jerainne Heywood. Previously originated in Washington D.C., the establishment is now owned by the Heywoods in North Texas.

data.title: Cloudflare to launch stablecoin 'NET Dollar' for instant payments in the agentic web, supported by AI agents.
data.description: Cloudflare, Inc. announced plans to introduce "NET Dollar," a stablecoin backed by the U.S. dollar, designed to facilitate instant, secure payments as AI agents conduct transactions online. The company envisions this as being essential for the "agentic web," where software agents manage purchases, subscriptions, and data access for users. NET Dollar aims to support pay-per-use and microtransactions on a large scale across the Internet. This move by Cloudflare, traded as NET on the NYSE, has sparked interest in investors. For more details on this development and to assess the merits of investing in NET stock, please visit the full article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Hood College Graduate School hosting online open house on Sept. 30 via Zoom for engagement with staff and faculty. Register at hood.edu/graduate/admission/visit-and-events.
data.description: Learn more about the Graduate School at Hood College in Frederick, Maryland during an Open House event on Tuesday, September 30th at both noon and 5:30 pm. This event will be held online via Zoom, and registration is required at hood.edu/graduate/admission/visit-and-events. Attendees will have the opportunity to engage with graduate school staff and faculty to gather information about the programs offered.

data.title: AI chatbot trained on top crypto traders with Anthropic’s Claude offers an edge by analyzing flows across 24 blockchains.
data.description: The latest bot, developed on Anthropic's Claude platform, has been trained using data on smart-money movements from 24 different blockchains.

data.title: Benzinga announces lineup for 2025 Fintech Day event in NYC; tech pioneers to feature. Detroit, Sept. 25, 2025.
data.description: The upcoming Benzinga Capital Conference Fintech Day & Awards in Detroit on September 25, 2025, will showcase a lineup of tech innovators, influential figures, and industry leaders. Benzinga, a prominent financial media and data organization, revealed a preview of the event that will honor various individuals shaping the fintech sector.

data.title: Field to Market and Cornell Atkinson Center launch program to train finance leaders for sustainable agriculture.
data.description: In a joint announcement on September 25, 2025, Field to Market: The Alliance for Sustainable Agriculture® and the Cornell Atkinson Center for Sustainability introduced the Resilient Futures Leadership Program: Financing Sustainable Agriculture. This six-month program aims to promote sustainable agricultural practices by providing leadership training and resources.

data.title: Swisslog Healthcare obtains HITRUST Certification for 2 years, ensuring info security; meeting regulatory compliance.
data.description: Swisslog Healthcare, a prominent healthcare technology provider based in Broomfield, Colorado, has successfully obtained HITRUST certification. This certification, known as HITRUST Risk-based, 2-year (r2) Certification, underscores the company's dedication to upholding stringent information security and data protection standards. This achievement confirms that Swisslog Healthcare's technology systems and platforms comply with rigorous regulatory and industry-established criteria.

data.title: Hippocratic AI and ERAAS Health partner to use climate data for real-time outreach to help at-risk populations, saving lives.
data.description: In Palo Alto, California and New York, a new initiative is leveraging climate data to proactively reach out to individuals in need. This innovative approach aims to save lives by engaging in real-time conversations that provide crucial information for staying safe. By operationalizing climate data, the program seeks to offer timely and compassionate support to those at risk. This effort highlights the importance of utilizing technology to help communities, showcasing the potential to make a significant impact on people's well-being.

data.title: WORK Medical Technology Group LTD priced $2.9 million Registered Direct Offering of 38,999,334 Class A ordinary shares at $0.075 each.
data.description: Hangzhou, China, September 25, 2025 - WORK Medical Technology Group LTD (Nasdaq: WOK) announced today that it has finalized a deal with several investors for the acquisition of 38,999,334 Class A ordinary shares, valued at $0.075 per share, through a registered direct offering. The agreement also includes pre-funded warrants as an alternative to shares, with an identical purchase price, excluding the $0.0005 per share exercise price. WORK Medical is a leading supplier of medical devices in China, operating through its subsidiary Work (Hangzhou) Medical Treatment Equipment Co., Ltd. and other branches across the country.

data.title: Linden Creek expands to Lancaster and York, PA, offering interior design services. Luxury firm from Raleigh, NC opens new franchise location.
data.description: Luxury interior design and home staging firm, Linden Creek, from Raleigh, North Carolina, has revealed the launch of its latest franchise in Lancaster and York counties in Pennsylvania. The new location aims to cater to a rapidly increasing demand for their services in the area.
